title: Map remaining public-handle lineage gaps
prompt: Inspect current manifest, public release status handles, focused reports, checks, and tests to identify the next safe repo-side proof-lineage gap after adversarial review lineage.
summary: Mapped remaining public-handle lineage surfaces and selected the focused progress digest report gap: progress_update_digest and bottleneck_log_digest expose sourceManifestPath in public status but the focused report/check/test do not render or assert those paths.
evidence: src/lib/publicReleaseStatusManifest.json progress_update_digest.sourceManifestPath=progress_updates; bottleneck_log_digest.sourceManifestPath=bottleneck_log; scripts/report-progress-digest-readiness.mjs public table lacks source lineage columns.

title: Implement one bounded lineage ratchet
prompt: Patch only existing report/check/test/manifest surfaces for the selected gap, preserve the staged workflow rename, and keep launch_decision blocked.
summary: Implemented progress digest public-handle lineage report/check/test/manifest surfaces without changing launch status.

title: Verify focused and broad contracts
prompt: Run syntax, focused report/check, progress digest, launch evidence manifest, commercial report, Vitest, TypeScript, and diff hygiene checks; refute any readiness or blocker-clearance claim.
summary: Verified the progress digest public-handle lineage ratchet across syntax, backlog status, focused JSON, focused report gates, manifest, commercial report, Vitest, TypeScript, and diff hygiene.
evidence: node --check passed for touched scripts and workflow.js; backlog status showed T001/T002 pass before verification; focused JSON current_phase=CEIP-SAFE-FIX-PROGRESS-DIGEST-PUBLIC-HANDLE-LINEAGE with sourceManifestPath progress_updates and bottleneck_log; check:progress-digest-report, check:launch-evidence-manifest, check:focused-launch-readiness-reports, check:commercial-launch-readiness-report, Vitest 2 files/17 tests, tsc -b, and git diff --check passed; manifest launch_decision and completion audit remain blocked.

title: Synthesize phase ledger
prompt: Record commit, manifest phase, checks, unresolved blockers, preserved staged rename, ECC route, and next adjustment.
summary: Prepared phase synthesis ledger for the progress digest public-handle lineage ratchet; final response will report the scoped commit and preserved staged workflow rename after git verification.
evidence: Manifest current phase is CEIP-SAFE-FIX-PROGRESS-DIGEST-PUBLIC-HANDLE-LINEAGE; launch_decision=blocked; completion audit=blocked; implementation/code optimization counts are 72/72; focused and broad checks passed; staged .windsurf to .devin workflow rename remains unrelated and preserved.
